nasb.text: Moreover, whenever the stronger of the flock were mating, Jacob would place the rods in the sight of the flock in the gutters, so that they might mate by the rods;

esv.text: Whenever the stronger of the flock were breeding, Jacob would lay the sticks in the troughs before the eyes of the flock, that they might breed among the sticks,

cnv.text: 到了肥壯的羊群要交配的時候，雅各就在羊群的面前把枝子插在水溝裡，使牠們在枝子中間彼此交配。

ccb.text: 每当肥壮的羊交配时，雅各就把有条纹的枝子插在水沟里，使羊对着树枝交配。

csbs.text: 每当比较肥壮的羊交配时，雅各就把枝子插在水沟里，就在羊的眼前，使它们在枝子那里交配。
